tokens.text: evaluates blocks by axis-aligned distance and random chance

fields.title: Axis
fields.description: The axis along which to measure distance.

fields.title: Min Chance
fields.description: Minimum chance value for the random probability.

fields.title: Max Chance
fields.description: Maximum chance value for the random probability.

description: Predicate that evaluates to true if the block is within the distance range along the provided axis and a random number is generated between the chance range.
